title: sageretia hamosa var. hamosa
intro: Sageretia hamosa var. hamosa, also known as the Chinese beautyberry or beautyberry, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Sageretia hamosa var. hamosa is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its berries are also used as a food source and in traditional medicine.
